summary: Hungarian CRM three fixes testing completed successfully. All three requested fixes are working: 1) Phone numbers display in single line format (whitespace-nowrap), 2) Recruiter column shows full names (Nagy Anna, Kovács Péter, Admin), 3) Salary (Bérezés) field successfully added to project positions and displays correctly as '2500 Ft/óra'.

Phone numbers display in single line format (no line wrapping)
Recruiter column (Toborzó) shows full names: 'Nagy Anna', 'Kovács Péter', 'Admin'
Positions tab accessible in project detail
Salary field (Bérezés) successfully implemented in positions
Position creation API works with salary field
Backend API returns 200 status for position creation
Project positions API includes salary field in response

success_percentage.backend: 100% (5/5 API tests passed - login, workers, projects, positions, salary creation)
